terms:
CASA ARTE PRIVEE FZ-LLC TERMS & CONDITIONS

Company Details:
CASA ARTE PRIVEE FZ-LLC
AL Hulaila Industrial Zone-FZ, Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirate
Phone: +393333920771 / +971585911456
Email: casaartepriveefze@artedicasaae.co

1. GENERAL
These Terms & Conditions (“T&C”) govern all quotations, orders, supplies, and services provided by CASA ARTE PRIVEE FZ-LLC (“Seller”) to the customer (“Buyer”). By accepting any quotation, proforma invoice, order confirmation, or making any payment, the Buyer is deemed to have fully accepted these Terms & Conditions.

2. PAYMENT TERMS
1. Advance Payment: A minimum of 55% of the total order value must be paid by the Buyer as an advance prior to commencement of production.
2. Balance Payment: The remaining 45% of the order value is payable before dispatch or delivery of goods.
3. Currency: Payments are preferably in EUR. Payments in any other currency may incur an additional currency spread.
4. Late Payments: Any payment not received by the due date may attract a 2% per month late fee and EUR 10 per CBM storage charge, capped at 3 months.

3. PRICING & QUOTATION
1. Prices provided are indicative and for study purposes only. Final pricing may vary depending on Buyer selection of fabric or other materials.
2. All quotations are EXW Italy unless otherwise stated, and therefore exclude shipping, customs clearance, duties, taxes, or any other import-related charges.

4. DELIVERY TIMELINE
1. Standard delivery is approximately three months from Italy, excluding public holidays.
2. This corresponds to approximately 95 working days.
3. Delivery timelines are estimates; Seller will make reasonable effort to adhere to them but shall not be liable for delays beyond its control.

5. FABRIC SELECTION & DEVELOPMENT
1. Travel costs associated with fabric selection may be billed separately.
2. The Buyer acknowledges that fabric selection is a consultative and developmental process, which may affect final pricing and timelines.

6. SHIPPING SERVICES
1. Collection, consolidation, and loading of goods to destination port may be charged separately or as a percentage of order value.
2. Buyer bears all risk of damage, loss, or delay during shipping.
3. Seller may assist with shipping claims but shall not be held liable for loss or damage incurred in transit.

7. DEFECTS & REPLACEMENT
1. Seller will replace defective items to the best of its ability.
2. Seller supports the replacement process but is not responsible for delays or consequential losses resulting from defects or replacements.

8. CERTIFICATION
Any certifications required for destination country will be billed separately and are the responsibility of the Buyer.

9. KYC & PAYMENT COMPLIANCE
Seller will not accept payments from unverified or unknown sources. Full KYC compliance is mandatory and may include company registration documents and passport of the person making payment.

10. LEGITIMATE FUNDS & INDEMNITY
All payments must originate from legitimate and verifiable sources. Buyer agrees to indemnify Seller from claims, losses, or damages arising due to misused, fraudulent, or unauthorized payments.

11. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
Seller’s maximum liability for any claim under this contract is limited to 5% of total order value. Seller shall not be liable for indirect, consequential, incidental, or special losses.

12. GOVERNING LAW & DISPUTE RESOLUTION
These T&C are governed by laws of the United Arab Emirates. Any disputes shall be resolved by arbitration under DIAC rules.

13. DIGITAL EXECUTION
These T&C may be executed digitally via electronic signatures. A digital signature is considered valid and legally binding.

14. SIGNATURES
